sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90976" key="prwtokaqedri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτο-καθεδρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n90976.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the first seat</tr_> in a public place, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg001.perseus-grc1:23:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Matt.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.6</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
